transcript: All right. Good afternoon and thank you for sticking it out. It's been a long day, especially those of you from the States like me who are on a different time—I don't even know what time it is to be honest with you. I have actually no idea what time zone I'm in or what time it is, but we'll get through it together. Actually, um, I'm super excited. I've got something I've been working on with my team uh for over a year now that we want to show you. Um, before I do that, so about 11 years ago today, I gave a presentation at the Launch Festival in San Francisco where I launched a neobank, unbeknownst to the crowd, based on Bitcoin. And the product was basically a synthetic dollar using Bitcoin that you could use to buy things, send money around, do remittances, whatever. And we won the Launch Festival competition. And to this day, I think most of the people who watched the presentation, probably 10,000 people plus the judges, I think maybe half of them finally figured out that we were using Bitcoin um in the background to create this synthetic dollar. This was before Ethereum, before Solana, before perpetual futures. So creating a synthetic dollar on Bitcoin was was uh quite a trick. So here we are 10 years plus, almost 11 years later, and we've come full circle. Abra—I'll give you some stats later on what we're doing—but we're one of the, you know, largest wealth advisors in the crypto space now. And we've come full circle and today I'm going to show you a new platform that we've been working on called AbraFi. AbraFi is a synthetic asset tokenization platform. What does that all mean? It means that we can now create, through a single platform, pretty much tokenized synthetic versions of anything. We're going to start with dollars. The platform was built from the ground up uh to be uh Solana native. And uh it's really cool what it can do. So I'm going to show you the first version uh of the platform which uses uh or which creates and instantiates uh synthetic dollars. And there will be future uh products released on AbraFi for uh synthetic equities, uh synthetic prediction market outcomes, a whole bunch of other uh concepts that we've we've been working on. We're actually going to give it away to the public. It's going to be released as a DAO. It's actually not owned by Abra Inc, uh my my employer. Uh and it's basically going to be owned by its governance uh token holders who will actually accrue uh the majority of the protocol revenue directly. And so Abra will obviously get some of those tokens as well, but um the the governance tokens will be owned by the the public who will have significant input on how the products work going forward. So USDAF is uh for AbraFi is the first um synthetic product that we're going to be launching. It's a fully backed, delta-hedged digital dollar. Uh unlike a stablecoin that simply stores dollars in a bank account, this uses myriad crypto digital assets, in this case mostly Solana, uh or uh Tether or Circle to maintain a peg. And then it uses uh different um DeFi protocols and primitives to maintain the peg and uh keeps fees at a at a minimum. We're going to be distributing this first through different DeFi protocols and eventually wallets. And our goal is to get neobanks, especially in emerging markets, to adopt this product. I've spent a lot of time myself uh working on uh different frontier uh banking protocols and solutions in different markets and I'm really excited about this. sUSDAF is the staked version which will generate yield. Um as I mentioned, it maintains the peg through uh different uh backing pools and there's different hedges and uh strategies. So unlike uh let's say um like Ethena, which you're probably familiar with, um the the yield that's generated actually comes from multiple solutions, not just a funding and basis trade, but several different uh DeFi-based primitives that the protocol then kind of aggregates and figures out what to do in real time. So it's actually meant to be as decentralized as a synthetic asset could possibly be today. I think this is really important. You know, we talk about real-world asset tokenization, but if you understand the real ethos of crypto, which is why I got into this in the first place, it's all about decentralization. And I think having a truly decentralized, yield-bearing dollar is a big breakthrough uh for the future of neobanking and and and a lot of the other kind of uh applications that want to become fully decentralized over time, especially in even in in AI where um, you know, I think dealing with bank accounts is going to be uh a big problem. We plan on and already are working on distribution uh all over the place. So our goal is to get USDAF everywhere and then leverage those distribution mechanisms to distribute tokenized equities, tokenized prediction market outcomes, and a bunch of other stuff that we're we're already working on, other commodities that we'd like to tokenize, uh and then eventually onto exchanges and other other types of wallets. So I think uh AbraFi really is going to be uh one of the key players in this space simply because we're going to make it as easy as possible for every developer out there to leverage uh the platform. We are working on a seeding program. We've been quietly seeding uh AbraFi and USDAF for several weeks now. Uh we're already over uh mid-eight figures in in seeding commits. We'll probably be nine figures by uh mid-December. Uh it will launch around January 1-ish. Um we just launched the Twitter handle for or X handle uh AbraFiOrg. So you can go follow AbraFiOrg and get more details. We're doing a uh promotional uh seeding launch where we're going to give um incremental yield uh in the form of the AFI governance tokens to uh early adopters so that the yield will effectively nearly double uh for several months. We may extend it beyond the initial few months just depending upon how things are going. Uh but uh we've been running it in the lab for quite a while and it's a super cool product and, you know, we're already looking at kind of the next-gen uh synthetic assets that we want to launch on the platform. So, um as I mentioned, um AFI is the governance token, will share most of the protocol revenue back to the token holders, which we think now is the time for DeFi platforms to really start looking at this approach. Uh and our goal is to make USDAF the de facto settlement layer for Solana and sUS—sUSDAF to obviously be the the savings layer for uh Solana as well. So please uh go to um, you know, you go to Abra.com or you can go to uh our new Twitter handle for uh for AbraFiOrg and and check it out and and uh you can also basically sign up and we'll we'll send you a note when when it's ready to uh to launch. In the meantime, I promised I'd give you a couple of quick uh updates on Abra. Uh we are—I guess small group here, we can talk amongst ourselves—so we are very, very strongly considering, uh I guess as much as my lawyers will let me say, going public in the first quarter, um which, you know, is a miracle given what the space has gone through uh in those of us who are from the US the last few years. So I'm really excited that um, you know, we've got an administration that's being very supportive of our space. Um our core asset management and wealth platform uh business has been booming. Uh Bitcoin-backed lending. This is part of why we wanted to get into tokenized assets was to basically take our vault-based model, which we consider to be the future of banking, and make all kinds of assets available to our clients. And once we dug in, we realized there was an even bigger opportunity to open it up to the public, which is what became the the AbraFi um piece of our solutions which we're going to give away to the public. So yeah, you can learn more on what about what we're doing at Abra.com. Follow us on Twitter uh slash X and uh stay tuned for the release of uh USDAF in the next couple of weeks. Thanks for the time and enjoy the rest of the conference.

sources.title: Onchain x LI.FI: Solana Breakpoint Campaign
sources.snippet:
Get Started on Onchain Wallet

[Download Now](https://crypto.com/en/onchain)

[EVENTS](https://crypto.com/en/events) \|2D AGO

# Onchain x LI.FI: Solana Breakpoint Campaign

Win USDC rewards or exclusive Onchain merch

10 - 17 DEC, 2025UTC

To mark Solana Breakpoint 2025, Crypto.com Onchain has partnered with Li.Fi for a special week-long campaign featuring an in-person giveaway and a Solana on-chain trading challenge.

Whether you're attending Breakpoint in Abu Dhabi or participating online, there’s something for everyone! Complete two simple activities to claim exclusive merchandise or trade using Onchain to win from a 2,000 USDC prize pool.

**CAMPAIGN-SPECIFIC TERMS:**

**Campaign Period**

- **Activity 1: Meet & Selfie Challenge:** 10 December 2025, 00:00 UTC to 13 December 2025, 23:59 UTC
- **Activity 2: Solana Trading Challenge:** 10 December 2025, 00:00 UTC to 16 December 2025, 23:59 UTC

**Activity 1. Meet & Selfie (@Breakpoint)**

Join us at the Etihad Arena in Abu Dhabi! Meet the Onchain or Li.Fi team, complete a simple trade, and walk away with exclusive merchandise.

**How to Participate**

_If you wish to participate in the campaign, you may consider completing the following actions:_

- Find an Onchain Wallet or LI.FI team member at Breakpoint,
- Take a selfie with them,
- Post the selfie publicly on X (formerly Twitter),
 - Tag: @onchain\_wallet and @lifiprotocol
 - Include hashtag: #LIFIOnchain
- Download and open the Crypto.com Onchain Wallet, and
- Complete a trade using LI.FI in the Crypto Onchain Wallet app
 - Any chain, any amount, cross-chain or same-chain

**Reward**

- Choose from Onchain-branded swag (“Merch Reward”).
- Available to the first 40 verified and eligible users during the Campaign Period of the Activity 1.
- Merch Reward must be claimed on-site after staff confirmation.
- Limit of one Merch reward per user per day.

**Activity 2: Solana Trading Challenge**

Trade using Onchain Wallet’s LI.FI integration with Solana as part of the route. The top three traders by volume during the campaign will win USDC rewards.

**How to Participate**

_If you wish to participate in the campaign, you may consider completing the following actions:_

- Use Onchain Wallet’s LI.FI-powered swap feature
- Trade involving Solana
 - Examples: ETH to SOL, SOL to USDC, USDC on Solana
- No minimum amount required
- Only trades completed using LI.FI inside the Onchain Wallet will count
- All trades must be performed on Onchain Wallet within the Campaign Period of the Activity 2.

**Rewards**

- **1st Place:** 1,000 USDC
- **2nd Place:** 500 USDC
- **3rd Place:** 250 USDC
- **4th Place:** 150 USDC
- **5th place:** 100 USDC

Winners will be announced within 7 days after the Campaign Period of the Activity 2 ends. Rewards will be sent directly to the eligible wallet addresses on Solana within 7 days after the winner announcement of Activity 2.

**Eligibility and Rules**

- No signup required. Wallet activity and public posts are used to determine eligibility
- All actions must take place within the campaign windows listed above
- Each user is only eligible for one reward per track per day
- Suspicious activity such as wash trading or duplicate wallets will lead to disqualification
- In case of a tie in trading volume, the user who reached that volume first will win
- Onchain Wallet staff will verify on-site winners by checking trade history and social media posts
- All rewards are subject to verification and may be withheld if conditions are not met

### **Important Information**

- The Crypto.com Onchain Wallet is a standalone, non-custodial product and is not part of the regulated Crypto.com App or Exchange ecosystem.
- The Solana Breakpoint Campaign (“ **Campaign**”) is organised by Crypto.com Onchain Wallet and LI.FI, and is [available in select jurisdictions only](https://help.crypto.com/en/articles/4429907-crypto-com-onchain-wallet-swap-geo-restrictions). Participation is optional and subject to eligibility requirem

# CoinBase and Solana Launch Cross-Chain Bridge Using Chainlink Protocol
Base and Solana launch Chainlink-secured bridge enabling cross-chain asset transfers. SOL and SPL tokens now tradeable on Base apps with $13.5B combined value.
![Trader Edge](https://coincentral.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/cropped-whFHHq4W-32x32.jpg)By[Trader Edge](https://coincentral.com/author/trader/)December 5, 2025**3 Mins Read
![](https://coincentral.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/coinbase.jpg "CoinBase and Solana Launch Cross-Chain Bridge Using Chainlink Protocol")
## TLDR
* Base and Solana launched a bridge using Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol to enable asset transfers between the two networks
* The bridge allows users to trade Solana tokens and SPL assets on Base apps like Zora, Aerodrome, and Virtuals
* Solana holds $9 billion in locked value as the second-largest blockchain while Base ranks sixth with $4.5 billion
* This marks a technical milestone connecting Ethereum Virtual Machine chains with Solana’s different architecture
* SOL and LINK tokens both dropped 3% following the announcement
💥Find the Next KnockoutStock!
Get live prices, charts, and KO Scores from[KnockoutStocks.com](https://knockoutstocks.com), the data-driven platform ranking every stock by quality and breakout potential.
Coinbase’s Base network and Solana have connected through a new bridge that allows users to move assets between the two blockchains. The bridge went live on mainnet this week using Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol.
> > Base meets Solana. Connected by Chainlink.
> > The Base-Solana Bridge is now live & secured by CCIP, unlocking native Solana asset support on Base and unified liquidity between both ecosystems.
[> @Base
](https://twitter.com/base?ref_src=twsrc^tfw)> 🤝Chainlink 🤝[> @Solana
](https://twitter.com/solana?ref_src=twsrc^tfw)[> https://t.co/iaXe4GYDJx
](https://t.co/iaXe4GYDJx)> [> https://t.co/Zaf3SoPtpY
](https://t.co/Zaf3SoPtpY)> [> pic.twitter.com/2SbI0P2oeO
](https://t.co/2SbI0P2oeO)
> > — Chainlink (@chainlink) [> December 4, 2025
](https://twitter.com/chainlink/status/1996657107597160887?ref_src=twsrc^tfw)
The new infrastructure enables users to trade Solana-based tokens on Base applications without leaving the Base environment. Apps including Zora, Aerodrome, Virtuals, Flaunch, and Relay have integrated the bridge for their users.
Base developers can now add support for[Solana](https://coincentral.com/solana-etfs-face-largest-ever-outflow-as-sol-price-tests-key-support-levels/)assets like SOL and SPL tokens directly in their applications. The bridge code is open-source and available on GitHub for a

tags.impact_reason: AbraFi, a Solana-native synthetic asset tokenization platform launching with USDAF (a delta-hedged digital dollar), could significantly impact Solana's DeFi ecosystem, especially given Abra's established presence, although the success hinges on adoption and governance.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a crystalline dollar sign being constructed as the anchor because it visually represents the core concept of a 'synthetic dollar'—a valuable, transparent, and man-made digital asset. The glowing, Solana-colored network inside signifies its blockchain-native foundation and the DeFi aspect of the AbraFi DAO. I included the diegetic text 'SYNTH' laser-etched on the base to directly reference the 'synthetic' nature of the product in a subtle, high-tech way, fitting the 'Wired Magazine' aesthetic.
visual_idea.description: A massive, flawless crystalline dollar sign ($) is being constructed in a dark, minimalist laboratory. Inside the transparent crystal, a dense network of vibrant, Solana-colored (green and purple) filaments pulse with data and light, representing the DAO network. The background is a shallow depth of field, showing blurred server racks with subtle data readouts. On the polished anodized metal platform holding the crystal, the word 'SYNTH' is delicately laser-etched, catching the internal glow.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A monumental, perfectly flawless crystalline dollar sign ($) is being meticulously constructed within a sophisticated, dark, minimalist laboratory, emphasizing epic scale and height. The towering structure dominates the vertical composition (3:4), leaving ample negative space towards the top, conveying its overwhelming presence. Within the transparent crystal's depths, a dense, intricate network of vibrant Solana-colored (radiant green and glowing purple) filaments pulsate with dynamic data and ethereal light, vividly representing the decentralized autonomous organization (DAO) network. The background features a shallow depth of field, rendering blurred server racks with subtle, illuminated data readouts, receding into the darkness. The crystal rests upon a highly polished anodized metal platform, where the word 'SYNTH' is delicately laser-etched into the surface, catching and reflecting the internal glow from the crystalline structure. The scene is illuminated with dramatic volumetric lighting and soft commercial product lighting (global illumination), creating cinematic contrast and showcasing realistic materials. This high-end visualization employs ray-traced optics, physically based rendering (PBR), and ambient occlusion for hyperrealistic detail. An extreme worm's-eye view, dynamic low-angle shot with an ultra-wide-angle lens exaggerates the perspective, making the dollar sign appear imposing and larger-than-life. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a crystalline dollar sign being constructed as the anchor because it visually represents the core concept of a 'synthetic dollar'—a valuable, transparent, and man-made digital asset. The glowing, Solana-colored network inside signifies its blockchain-native foundation and the DeFi aspect of the AbraFi DAO. I included the diegetic text 'SYNTH' laser-etched on the base to directly reference the 'synthetic' nature of the product in a subtle, high-tech way, fitting the 'Wired Magazine' aesthetic.
visual_idea.description: A macro, detailed close-up of the crystalline dollar sign's interior. The focus is on the intricate, glowing network of green and purple filaments as they branch and intersect within the flawless crystal. The light from the filaments creates complex refractions and caustic patterns, emphasizing the sophisticated and purely digital nature of the asset.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro, detailed close-up of the crystalline dollar sign's interior. The focus is on the intricate, glowing network of green and purple filaments as they branch and intersect within the flawless crystal. The light from the filaments creates complex refractions and caustic patterns, emphasizing the sophisticated and purely digital nature of the asset. The crystal dollar sign is rendered with hyper-detailed crystalline glass, exhibiting perfect clarity and internal light diffusion, casting warm amber reflections onto surrounding polished anodized metallic surfaces. Volumetric lighting permeates the scene, creating an atmospheric glow that enhances the depth and intricate microdetails. The composition is symmetrical and centrally focused, tightly framed to fill the entire 1:1 square canvas with rich texture and detail. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, Unreal Engine 5, physically based rendering (PBR), high dynamic range (HDR).

editorial.headline: Abra Launches Solana Synthetic Dollar DAO Ahead of 2026 IPO
editorial.standfirst: Institutional wealth manager Abra is spinning out its DeFi infrastructure into AbraFi, a Solana-native DAO launching a yield-bearing synthetic dollar. The move decentralizes the product's risk profile while Abra Inc. prepares for a potential Q1 2026 public listing.
key_takeaways: AbraFi will launch USDAF, a delta-hedged synthetic dollar backed by SOL, USDT, and USDC, governed by the new AFI token.
The protocol operates as a DAO independent of Abra Inc., with majority revenue flowing to AFI holders starting Q1 2026.
Abra CEO Bill Barhydt confirmed the firm is actively targeting a public listing in Q1 2026 alongside the protocol's rollout.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a strategic pivot that bridges institutional wealth management with decentralized infrastructure, **Abra** CEO **Bill Barhydt** unveiled **AbraFi**, a Solana-native protocol designed to tokenize synthetic assets. The platform’s flagship product, **USDAF**, enters the competitive synthetic dollar arena—currently dominated by Ethena’s USDe—but distinguishes itself through a diversified backing model. Unlike competitors relying heavily on a single basis trade, USDAF utilizes a basket of **SOL**, **USDT**, and **USDC**, employing multiple DeFi primitives and delta-hedging strategies to maintain its peg. This multi-collateral approach aims to mitigate the specific counterparty risks that have historically plagued synthetic fiat models.

The structural separation of AbraFi represents a sophisticated evolution in crypto corporate strategy. By launching AbraFi as a **DAO** rather than a subsidiary, Abra effectively spins out the regulatory complexity of yield-bearing DeFi products while retaining distribution rights for its institutional client base. The governance token, **AFI**, is designed to capture the majority of protocol revenue, aligning incentives with decentralized liquidity providers rather than centralized equity holders. Barhydt confirmed that the project has already secured mid-eight figures in seeding commitments, with a target to breach nine figures by mid-December, signaling strong early institutional appetite for a Solana-based yield alternative.

Perhaps the most significant 'alpha' for investors lies in the dual-track roadmap: a decentralized protocol launch coinciding with a centralized corporate liquidity event. Barhydt revealed that **Abra Inc.** is "strongly considering" a public listing in Q1 2026. This timing suggests a calculated play to capitalize on a favorable administration and renewed market vigor. For the Solana ecosystem, AbraFi’s deployment validates the network's high-throughput architecture as the preferred layer for complex, high-frequency hedging engines required by institutional-grade synthetic assets.
